value.0: You have agreed to help out the Miller of Bree with his lost son and shipment of Ale.The miller said that his son and the shipment was destined for Tharbad along the South Greenway Road.
Having taken care of the grim business of delivering the bad news to the Miller. His grieve will hold with him till the next harvest. But perphaps he can find solace in his wife and the Ale he makes.
Bree Millers Son

Elrond has set me two tasks.
1. Break the siege of the Urukai threatening the Trollshaws, east of Rivendell, and bring back the Helm of Azog the Warlord.
2. Venture into the Mines of Moria and descend to Balin's Tomb, deep within Dwarrow Delf. A mutant horror has defiled the dwarven tomb — slay it and recover its head as proof for Elrond.
My missions to Elrond have been completed, I now have a new place to call home.
Elrond's Request

I am to help the Temple Illuvatar feed the hungry citizens of Tharbad. I am to purchase venison from the local general store.And proceed to the bridge of Tharbad.There the hungry refugees await.Imust feed 20 of them to recieve compensation.

The downtroden refugees will not loose sleep over muscle spasms brought on by hunger.Their children will not wither and die.You have given selflessly for a noble cause and overcome another side affect of the war against Sauron.
Feeding Tharbad
A man named Bill Ferny has lost a ring to an underling who was chased into a nearby cave. I agreed to go search the cave and return the ring. Although Ferny sure does seem the shifty type.

I brought back Ferny's Ring. Although I am concerned by the enscription."Servant of Sharkey" doesn't sound to appealing. Well I best go collect my reward and then maybe see what I can find out about this Sharkey character.
An ambush awaited me in Ferny's Hole of a house. I kept the letter in the hopes of finding someone who can tell me more about it.
An Ambush awaited me in Ferny's Hole of a house. I gave Ferny back his stupid letter, and i shall keep my eye out for more Servants of Sharkey.
Ferny's Ring
Travel to the Ruins of Dale and retrieve the heirloom stolen from Gloisin.
You were well rewarded for your return of Gloisin's heirloom.  Adventuring does have its advantages.
Gloison's Heirloom

=== Guilds ===
Tired of having parties...wanna make something big with many people?
Then you can make a Guild. Keep it safe and no swearing.

If you wanna create you own Guild then you must undergo these tasks;

1* Be in the Hall of Legends

2* You must have the ability to run and maintain your Guild or else it WILL BE disbanded.

3* Your Guild must have an ACCEPTABLE name, speak to a DM about it.

4* Find a CO Leader to join you in your quest to create a Guild...CO Leaders must undergo tasks 1 and 5 .

5* All your characters will be deleted but your MAIN Guild Leader character. That will be the MAIN MAIN MAIN character you will use for any Guild affiliation. Before becoming a leader, you may transfer your gear to your MAIN before getting your other characters deleted. Your MAIN MUST LOOK GOOD, and once your MAIN is created, you will automatically get 40 lvls for your MAIN only. After all this, you may create new characters but they must have your Guild name on.(((THIS WILL HAPPEND AFTER MAKE YOUR GUILD))) If you dont understand this then E-Mail Lord Deems with your question.

Features of Creating a Guild;

Once you create your Guild, then you may purchase a Lair for your Guild, there members may meet and socialize and do whatever. Also, with a Lair you get access to special things. To see a DEMO of a normal Guild Lair please visit the Lair Area. 

Guild Leaders will receive a 'special item' , only 4 will be in the server. Also Leaders will get DM Powers(Lesser) to help maintaining the Guild. Leaders may make their owns Ranking system and give power to members. There is so MUCH things you can do as a Leader of a Guild.....its great!


Joining a Guild....

Joining a Guild will be determined by the Leader and CO Leader of the Guild. DMs cannot interfere with any Guild activity or affiliation, unless permitted by a Lord Deems or a Leader of the Guild.

Wanna increase your chances of joining a Guild? Then try hitting to be in Hall of Legends!
Guilds

An old woman in Bree told me to seek out the Ruins of Annuminas which lay North along the Greenway Pass. Once an ancient realm of the Dunandain, I might be able to seek adventuring uncovering it's mysteries.
Ruin of Annuminas

===  Server Rules ===
These rules must be sctrictly and specifically followed, there is no loop hole to trick the rules. Please abide to the rules as much as you can.

1) Never use Cheats or do Cheats of any kind, that INCLUDES item duplicating of any kind and even the lesser kind of cheating. DMs and Mods will be keeping an eye on the Server. We Know them all. If you know any, don't Abuse them. .2da editing is not allowed, YOU WILL BE COUGHT.Report them and you'll be rewarded accordingly.

2) No swearing on shout, incase you dont know what it means, swearing is cursing, bad words, insults, anything stupid. Use shout frequently and for GOOD purposes.

3) If you loose items, please talk to a DM about it. Remember you won't always get the items you lost back. So unless your reason is REASONABLE then you will be helped. No not complaining!

4) And when in a Guild PLEASE YOU MUST FOLLOW SERVER RULES 1- 10 + Guild RULES!!!! Braking this rule will cause you to loose your Membership in a Guild. Same applies to Leaders

5)  Although Role Playing is not required, people that Role Play to any extent are often the most likely to be chosen Ranked in the Hall of Legends, rewards will come in handy.

6) PVP - REMEMBER when you just killed some creature who dropped something you all want, never ninja loot it...remember to ROLL FOR IT, whoever rolls the highest gets it. Its only fair. Thats why I made that Roll script in the emote wand. NINJA LOOTING IS PATETHIC, do not do it. You may not ninja loot your own party or Guild members. Pick Pocketing IS NOT ALLOWED IN THE ARENA AT ANY TIME. Ransoming someones items is not required, but encouraged. Ransoming is Role Playing, and Role Playing gets you Ranks and reward. Monk Speed Thieves are not welcome here, but are allowed. You will simply be disputed and disliked, eventually someone will get you banned.Pick Pocketing, Disarming, and Ninja Looting are all allowed. But as I said, you will simply be disputed and disliked, eventually someone will get you banned.

7) Leading NPCs to other areas by running from them or Domination are not acceptable actions here. Please do not do this, Running for your life is one this leading a NPC to other areas is another. If a creature chases you to another area, please report it to a DM immediatly.

8) If you are in a Guild you MUST answer a shout for aid by an NPC of your faction. 

9) Do not disrespect DMs or other Players, the DM is always right.

10)  Following the rules at the best of your abilities will get you rewarded.
Server Rules
You have agreed to face Azagoth and attempt to stop his entrance to the Well of Souls. May god grace your steps for no one else will walk them.
Azagoth is dead and the Well of Souls is safe. Your task completed, you think perphaps a drink at the prancing pony and stories of your vistory are in order.
The Well of Souls

Join the community on Discord for server updates, announcements, in-game reward codes, and more.

  https://discord.gg/VpAtSpe
Website

A strange music whispers across Middle-earth — fragments of wisdom carried on a beat that should not exist here. Seven legends are scattered across the world. Find them, prove yourself, and the Hall of Legends will open to you.
One legend recognises me. Six remain.
Two of the seven walk beside me now in spirit. Five remain.
Three legends have shared their wisdom. Four remain.
Four legends. The music grows clearer.
Five legends gathered. Two voices still hidden.
Six legends recognise me. One voice remains.
All seven legends are mine. Akira the Don awaits in the Hall of Legends — find the Wayshrine in the Well of Eru.
Akira the Don passed me the mixtape. The path of meaning is walked, but the journey never ends.
The Path of Meaning
I have encountered Jordan Peterson, the Sage of Order. He asks me to prove I understand responsibility, hierarchy, and meaning before he will walk with me.
Peterson recognises me as a willing bearer of weight. I may summon him as a guide when I rest.
MW: Jordan Peterson
Alan Watts, the Mystic of the Tao, waits beside a quiet stream. He will teach me only if I can answer his questions about the play of the universe.
Watts laughed and called me a fellow rascal. He will appear when I rest.
MW: Alan Watts
Joseph Campbell, the Mythkeeper, sits in an old barrow surrounded by relics. He has set me a hero's-journey of my own to walk before he will accept me.
Campbell smiled and said I was following my bliss. He will guide me when I rest.
MW: Joseph Campbell
Terence McKenna, the Bard of the Mushroom, offered me a strange fungus. He says I must eat it and survive the visions to truly meet him.
I returned from the vision. McKenna will appear when I rest.
MW: Terence McKenna
Jocko Willink, the Iron Captain, drills his men at a forward camp. He says I must complete his combat trial before he marches with anyone.
GOOD. Jocko owns me as a brother-in-arms. He will rise when I rest.
MW: Jocko Willink
Carl Jung, the Shadow-Walker, holds a dark mirror. He says I cannot know him until I have faced what stands behind me.
I integrated my shadow. Jung walks with me when I rest.
MW: Carl Jung
Marcus Aurelius, the Philosopher King, sits on a ruined throne. He will judge me only if I can speak about what is and is not in my power.
The Emperor nodded once. He will summon when I rest.
MW: Marcus Aurelius
Jordan Peterson has a task for me. (Content forthcoming.)
MW Loyalty: Jordan Peterson
Alan Watts has a task for me. (Content forthcoming.)
MW Loyalty: Alan Watts
Joseph Campbell has a task for me. (Content forthcoming.)
MW Loyalty: Joseph Campbell
Terence McKenna has a task for me. (Content forthcoming.)
MW Loyalty: Terence McKenna
Jocko Willink has a task for me. (Content forthcoming.)
MW Loyalty: Jocko Willink
Carl Jung has a task for me. (Content forthcoming.)
MW Loyalty: Carl Jung
Marcus Aurelius has a task for me. (Content forthcoming.)
MW Loyalty: Marcus Aurelius

Sald, a potion merchant on Kallrist Island, will pay 200 gold for every Kallrist Tiger Heart I bring him. The tigers prowl the island's shores, interior, and crypts. This is open-ended work — I can return with hearts whenever I please.
Kallrist Tiger Hunt
The keeper of the Green Dragon Inn asked me to recover a ring stolen by one of Sharkey's men. Sharkey's henchmen are lurking nearby — I will need to deal with them and bring the ring back.
I recovered the stolen ring and returned it to the keeper of the Green Dragon Inn. He rewarded me well, and I am always welcome there now.
The Green Dragon Inn

At the Erab Oasis of Gwathdor I learned that the Gwathdor Lord is preparing to destroy the oasis that holds the evil of the Gwathdor Caves at bay. I agreed to help stop his servants before their attack can come.
The Oasis of Gwathdor
A headstone in Bree radiates a foul curse, and the restless undead will not lie quiet. Perhaps a dispelling — or a remove curse — cast upon the grave would put the spirits to rest.
I cleansed the cursed grave in Bree. The unquiet dead trouble it no longer.
The Cursed Grave

=== Module Customizations ===

This module includes custom changes to spells, appearance, and leveling. Read on for an overview.

--- Epic Spell Enhancements ---

Epic spells have been greatly improved beyond standard NWN:

Dragon Knight: Summons a level-60 Fighter Red Dragon (CR 123, 540 HP, Str/Dex/Con/Cha 40). Duration 30 rounds. Cannot be dispelled.

Mummy Dust: Summons a dual-class level-60 undead warrior (CR 212, 520 HP). Duration 30 hours. Cannot be dispelled.

Epic Ward: Damage Reduction 60/+20. Cannot be dispelled. Duration scales with caster level.

Hellball: 10d20 of each damage type (Acid, Electrical, Fire, Sonic) in a massive area. Reflex save for partial reduction. Causes knockdown if total damage exceeds 200.

Greater Ruin: Up to 5000 damage (10d20 x25) to a single target. Fortitude save for partial reduction.

Curse Song (Bard): Fully custom scaling across 30+ tiers based on Perform skill and level. At high ranks: -15 attack, -15 AC, -7 all saves, -18 all skills, and 98 sonic damage in a colossal radius.

--- Other Spell Changes ---

Summon Creature (I-IX): Fixed duration of 24 hours (no longer scales with level).

Time Stop: Disabled. Cannot be cast.

--- Spells/Systems NOT Changed (Stock Standard) ---

The following are commonly modified on other servers but are left at standard NWN behavior here:

True Seeing: Works exactly as written - penetrates all illusions and invisibility. No nerfs.

Stealth/Hide: Standard mechanics. No custom detection bonuses or penalties beyond what the ruleset provides.

Subraces: No subrace system. All characters use standard NWN races with default racial bonuses only.

--- Appearance Customization ---

Player Appearance (Bree): Talk to one of the cows in Bree to access an appearance menu with 315+ creature forms. This is free and permanent until changed again.

Item Appearance Crafting: Armor and weapon appearance can be remodelled using the CEP crafting system (accessed via the Craft Armor/Weapon skill in conversation). No fail chance - all appearance changes succeed automatically regardless of skill level.

--- Legendary Leveling: Levels 41-60 ---

Once you reach level 40, you may continue advancing to level 60 through the Legendary Leveling system. Speak to the Legendary Leveler NPC in the Legendary Leveling area to advance.

On each Legendary level-up you WILL gain:
  - Skill points
  - Hit Points (based on your highest-class hit die, not caster level)
  - Ability score increases (at standard intervals)
  - Feats (one selectable feat per level)

On each Legendary level-up you will NOT gain:
  - Caster level increases (spell power does not grow past level 40)
  - New spell slots or spell levels
  - Class-based progression (no new class features, BAB, or saving throw improvements)

In short: Legendary levels make you tougher and more versatile through raw stats and feats, but do not increase spellcasting power.

XP required climbs steeply - from ~49,000 per level at 41 to over 3,000,000 for level 60 (total ~17.5M XP to reach 60).
Module Customizations

I struck a dread figure enthroned in the Dimholt and my blows did it no harm at all. "No mortal weapon can wound the King of the Dead," it mocked. If any can master the Oathbreakers, it would be the heir of Isildur. I should seek him at the gates of Minas Tirith.

Aragorn, son of Arathorn, bears Anduril, the Flame of the West, reforged from the shards of Narsil. He will entrust a copy of the blade only to one who proves worthy: I am to slay the Witch-king of Angmar, chief of the Nazgul, and return with proof of the deed.
I would not wait on Aragorn's leave. I cut him down and took the Flame of the West from his body. The blade is mine now -- but Gondor will not forget what was done at her gates.
I brought the crown-shard of the fallen Witch-king to Aragorn, and he placed the Flame of the West in my hands. Now I can return to the Dimholt and lay the King of the Dead to rest.
With Anduril in hand I faced the King of the Dead, and this time my blade bit true. The Oathbreakers of the Dimholt are at peace at last.
Paths of the Dead
